title: Ubiquiti UA-G3-B, UniFi Access G3 Reader, black
description: Ubiquiti UniFi Access Reader G3 is a black, compact card reader from the UniFi Access system family. You can unlock doors using an NFC-compatible card, the UniFi Identity mobile app, and now also your Apple device, thanks to the Touch Pass * feature. Unlocking doors has never been easier! With its minimalist design and versatile mounting options, it fits seamlessly into any interior. The reader can be installed both flushed and surface-mounted * Users will receive 10 free Touch Passes in the first year to get started. Additional passes are per user per year Reader Mountig box for flush install Mounting panel for US box Cover frame (2) Drilling templates RJ45 connector rubber cover Installation accessories
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 48V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 5
